title: Onboarding - Navigating through onboarding screens
scenario: User can swipe left/right or tap Continue to navigate through the three onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal)
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile Android app.
2. Observe the onboarding flow that appears on first launch (or after clearing app data).
3. On the first onboarding screen ("Organized"), attempt to swipe left to navigate to the next screen.
4. Alternatively, tap the "Continue" button on the "Organized" screen.
6. Swipe left again or tap the "Continue" button to navigate to the third screen.
8. Swipe right on the "Personal" screen to navigate back to the "Up-to-Date" screen.
9. Continue swiping right to return to the "Organized" screen.
expected: User can smoothly scroll left and right through all three onboarding screens ("Organized", "Up-to-Date", "Personal") by swiping left/right or tapping the "Continue" button. Navigation is bidirectional and responsive.
